# x-twitter-scraper_x_dm (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account` (String) X account (@username or account ID)
- `text` (String)
- `user_id` (String)

### Optional

### Read-Only

- `success` (Boolean)
